violations.text: The warewashing area/ back prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The door to the outside, located at the northwest side of the building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Laminate lined counter near fryer and holding handsink is in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The receptacle in toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. floor tiles under 3 bay sink 2. floor near fryers 3. coving by 3 bay sink Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Active food prep was observed in kitchen handsink basin during time of inspection. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The warewashing area/ back prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The door to the outside, located at the northwest side of the building, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Laminate lined counter near fryer and holding handsink is in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Establishment is lacking a mop sink. Mop sink required. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The receptacle in toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. floor tiles under 3 bay sink 2. floor near fryers 3. coving by 3 bay sink Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
